title: TODO: short title
description: The orders endpoint is timing out under load. The root cause is an N+1 query pattern: for each order returned from the database, a separate findById call fetches the associated user. 100 orders = 101 queries. The fix is to batch all user lookups into a single findByIds call, and add the BATCHED_USER_LOOKUP=true marker.
hint_1: read ordersService.js to understand the query pattern
hint_3: Replace the per-order loop query with a single batched findByIds() call
hint_4: collect userIds from all orders, call db.users.findByIds(userIds), build a map, attach users per order, add BATCHED_USER_LOOKUP=true
